code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
let n = tokens.len()
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    mut seen = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < i
      match tokens.get(j)
      when Some(u)
        if t == u
          seen = true
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if not seen
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("unique=#{count}")
